name: 10q22_SHTN1_BMPR1A_distal_SD
description: 10q22.3 distal-to-PTEN segmental duplication region around SHTN1/KIAA1598 and the BMPR1A locus. The same SD pair that flanks PTEN at 10q23 extends into 10q22.3 and mediates the larger 10q22-q23 microdeletion variant in juvenile polyposis-of-infancy.

architecture.internal_structure: Paired SD blocks of 50-150 kb at 96-98% identity define proximal breakpoint of the 10q22-q23 microdeletion; intervening unique sequence harbours BMPR1A.
